name: agoda-food
description: Agoda Food — LINE Bot + LIFF lunch ordering app

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agoda-food/backend" "npm run dev -w @agoda-food/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agoda-food/frontend && npm run build -w @agoda-food/backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w @agoda-food/frontend && npm run -w @agoda-food/backend build -- --noEmit
